texto: Maybe the human brain is an object beyond the reach of metaphor, for the simple reason that it is the only object capable of creating metaphors to describe itself. There really is nothing else like it. The human brain creates the human mind, and then the human mind tries to underhand the human brain, however long it takes and whatever the cost.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Luke Dittrich: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a inteligencia. O trecho “Maybe the human brain is an object beyond the reach of metaphor, for the simple reason that it is…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que inteligencia, brain, mind pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e mind.
